# GreenEdge Property Care
> Get the GreenEdge.
Owner-operated gardening, pressure washing, and gutter cleaning across Adelaide.

## About
GreenEdge Property Care is Harrison Lelli — a young Adelaide tradie with a passion for gardening and a thing about doing work properly.
It started simply: a genuine love of making outdoor spaces look their best, and a frustration with services that cut corners or send whoever's available that week. GreenEdge is the answer to that — one person, consistent quality, real care for every yard he works on.
One year in and growing. If you want your property looking sharp, call Harrison.

## Services
- **Gardening & Lawn Care** — Mowing, edging, weeding, hedging, and garden maintenance. Weekly, fortnightly, or one-off.
- **Pressure Washing** — Driveways, paths, patios, fences, and hard surfaces blasted clean.
- **Gutter Cleaning** — Gutters cleared of leaves, debris, and blockages. Downpipes checked and flushed.

## Service Areas
Newton, Norwood, Burnside, Kensington, Toorak Gardens, Prospect, Walkerville, North Adelaide, Adelaide CBD, Unley, Hyde Park, Parkside, Fullarton, Mitcham, Glenelg, Brighton, Henley Beach, West Lakes, Modbury, Tea Tree Gully

## Credentials & Trust
- Fully insured
- Owner-operated
- Free quotes

## Frequently Asked Questions
**Q: Do you provide free quotes?**
A: Yes. Harrison comes out, looks at the job, and gives you a straight price. No obligation.

**Q: What areas do you service?**
A: Based in Newton — happy to travel across metro Adelaide. If you're not sure whether we cover your area, just call.

**Q: Do you do one-off jobs or only regular maintenance?**
A: Both. One-off clean-ups, pre-sale tidy-ups, and regular maintenance schedules are all available.

**Q: Are you insured?**
A: Yes. Fully covered with public liability insurance.

**Q: Do you bring your own equipment?**
A: Yes — all tools and equipment supplied. You don't need to provide anything.

**Q: What happens if it rains on my scheduled day?**
A: We'll reschedule within the week. No charge for weather delays.

**Q: Do I need to be home?**
A: Not unless you want to be. Most clients just leave access and we send a photo when done.

**Q: How does payment work?**
A: Invoice after the job, payable by bank transfer or card.
